Couples Consultant

everything between you

A private, safe space for couples ready to rediscover each other. Where the distance between two people begins to close — one honest conversation at a time.

Begin Your Journey Discover More

About

The space between
two people is where
everything begins.

Lori works with couples who feel the distance growing — not because love is gone, but because life got in the way. Through compassionate, structured dialogue and a deeply personal approach, she helps partners rediscover the connection that brought them together.

My work begins in the silence between two people who still care — and helps them find the words they’ve been searching for.
12+ Years of Practice
300+ Couples Supported
2+1 You, Your Partner & Lori
100% Confidential
What I Offer

Pathways back to each other

01

Rekindling Connection

Reignite the intimacy and emotional closeness that distance and routine have dimmed. Lori creates a space where both partners feel truly seen and heard.

Explore
02

Communication & Trust

Learn to speak and listen in ways that build bridges instead of walls. Practical tools for breaking cycles of conflict and rebuilding mutual trust.

Explore
03

Crisis & Crossroads

For couples facing betrayal, major life changes, or the quiet question of whether to stay. A guided, compassionate process toward clarity — whatever the answer may be.

Explore
How We Work

The process

01
The First Session

A safe, private conversation to understand where you are as a couple, what brought you here, and what you both hope to find on the other side.

02
Your Shared Journey

A tailored process designed around your unique dynamic as a couple. No judgement, no sides taken — only genuine support for both of you.

03
The Work Between Sessions

Guided exercises and reflections to practice between sessions. Real change happens in everyday moments — Lori equips you for both.

04
Growing Together

Ongoing support as your relationship evolves. Growth is rarely smooth — Lori walks alongside you through every stage of the journey.

"

We came to Lori not sure if there was anything left to save. A year later, we’re closer than we’ve ever been. She has a rare gift for finding the love that’s still there — even when you’ve stopped seeing it yourself.

— R. & M., married 11 years

Ready to find your way back to each other?

Lori works with a small number of couples at a time to ensure every session receives the care it deserves. Reach out — the first step is simply saying you’re ready.
